signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Lower than 2.3-2.4% Consensus)** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3]

South Korea's annual consumer price inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven mainly by oil prices amid Middle East tensions, but undershot market forecasts of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps and food vouchers that contained the rise[1][2]
